name: PM-KISAN (Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi)
description: PM-KISAN provides income support to eligible landholding farmer families through periodic direct benefit transfers. The scheme aims to supplement financial needs for agricultural and allied activities.

name: PMKSY Irrigation (Pradhan Mantri Krishi Sinchai Yojana)
description: PMKSY supports improved irrigation access and water-use efficiency through components like micro-irrigation and watershed development. Benefits and support vary by component and state implementation guidelines.

name: KCC Kisan Credit Card
description: Kisan Credit Card provides timely credit to farmers for cultivation and other farm-related needs through banks and cooperative institutions. Interest subvention and repayment terms depend on bank policy and government guidelines.

name: PMFBY Crop Insurance (Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana)
description: PMFBY offers crop insurance coverage against yield losses due to non-preventable natural risks, pests, and diseases. Farmer premium rates are capped for notified crops while the balance premium is subsidized.

name: Soil Health Card Scheme
description: The Soil Health Card Scheme provides soil test-based nutrient recommendations to help farmers improve soil health and productivity. Soil samples are tested and the advisory is issued through a Soil Health Card.

name: eNAM Electronic Market (National Agriculture Market)
description: eNAM is an online trading platform that integrates APMC mandis to enable transparent price discovery for agricultural produce. Farmers can register to access market information and participate in electronic trading where enabled.

name: PKVY Organic Farming
description: PKVY promotes organic farming through cluster-based certification and support for organic inputs under a participatory guarantee system. Assistance is implemented through state agencies and varies by program guidelines.

name: RKVY Agriculture Development (Rashtriya Krishi Vikas Yojana)
description: RKVY provides flexibility to states to implement projects that strengthen agriculture and allied sectors based on local priorities. Support is routed through state-led projects and beneficiary selection follows approved state guidelines.

name: PM Kisan MAN-DHAN (Pradhan Mantri Kisan Maandhan Yojana)
description: PM-KMY is a voluntary and contributory pension scheme for eligible small and marginal farmers. Subscribers receive a monthly pension after the age of 60 subject to contribution and eligibility conditions.

name: National Horticulture Mission
description: The National Horticulture Mission supports holistic growth of the horticulture sector through assistance for planting material, area expansion, protected cultivation, and post-harvest management. Benefits depend on state action plans and component-wise norms.

name: Paramparagat Krishi Vikas Yojana
description: Paramparagat Krishi Vikas Yojana promotes organic farming through formation of farmer clusters and certification support. The scheme encourages adoption of organic inputs and practices with implementation through state agencies.

name: ATMA Agricultural Technology (Agricultural Technology Management Agency)
description: ATMA strengthens agricultural extension services by enabling farmer-oriented trainings, demonstrations, and advisory activities at the district level. Support and activities are delivered through district ATMA plans and local agriculture departments.
